assertions.evidence: Lines 3, 9: Agent notes the arXiv abstract URL auto-converts to PDF and calls `display_pdf` with the converted URL (https://arxiv.org/pdf/2401.01234). Line 11 confirms the PDF is now open in the interactive viewer.

Lines 15-23: Agent explicitly reads methodology section via `interact` → `get_text` before proposing annotations. Lines 19-23 show extracted content (problem statement, proposed approach, experimental setup, key assumptions). Lines 93-101: Agent similarly reads results section before annotating, extracting comparative results, performance metrics, statistical significance, and ablation studies.

Lines 42-78: First batch of 4 methodology annotations (highlight, note, underline, stamp) applied via single `add_annotations` call. Lines 120-160: Second batch of 4 results annotations applied via separate `add_annotations` call. Response shows annotations grouped by section (methodology then results) rather than all at once.

Line 81: After methodology batch, agent calls `get_screenshot` to verify and show results. Line 83-87: Reports what's visible in the screenshot (algorithm highlight, sticky note, underline, stamp). Line 163: After results batch, agent calls `get_screenshot` again. Lines 165-169: Reports visible annotations from results section screenshot.
Line 189: Agent explicitly states 'You can now **download the annotated PDF** directly from the viewer toolbar.' Also notes annotations are embedded and will persist in other PDF readers.
